HealthFirst Insurance
EXPLANATION OF BENEFITS
THIS IS NOT A BILL
Member: ANNA KOVAL
Claim #: 987654321

Provider: Riverside Medical Group
Date of service: 12/05/2025

Amount billed: $450.00
Plan discount: -$180.00
Amount plan paid: $216.00
Your responsibility (copay/coinsurance): $54.00

This document explains how your claim was processed. It is not a bill. Your provider may send you a separate bill for the amount shown as 'your responsibility.' If you think this claim was processed incorrectly, you may file an appeal within 180 days of this notice.

expected._note: The 180-day appeal window is a real but relative deadline, so we assert its presence, not an exact date.
